rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE FIORANI LIVING TRUST DTD. 1/25/02 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Action With Prejudice And Objection To Schedule Hearing Of The Petition; P & A In Support.
rulings.Rulings: The motion to dismiss is denied because the applicable measuring date is the filing of the pending petition, not the original 2005 petition to compel an accounting. The Court expects that the current petition either would end up either consolidated with the pending civil case filed by the trustee or would be subject to being stayed pending the civil case¿s resolution, but it is not subject to dismissal or abatement on account of that other case filed by a different plaintiff, albeit seeking, in part, the same ultimate relief. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and must notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 4/11/12.

rulings.Case Title: THE ESTATE OF BARBARA HIRSCHFELDER HANEN
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Leave Of Court To Intervene; Deckaration Of A. Dovbish.
rulings.Rulings: The motion to intervene is denied. Even if the Court were to presume that Ms. Waterman is an interested party, her proposed complaint in intervention would enlarge the issues raised by the existing parties in the current case. Any party who wishes to argue the motion must advise opposing parties and must notify the Courtroom Clerk (415-551-3702) by 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, 4/11/12.
